title: CREATUS
content:
CREATUS

To Do List:
  1. Finish the recording process — Saveus, Drain, Warfare — consider an order of songs, in order to create a cohesive sounding album — Dustin’s listing is favored, atm — drum track sweep
  2. Finish the mixing and mastering process — ~1 month — the rest of the stuff can come in the interim
  3. Create artwork (Band Photos, Album Artwork)
  4. Website
  5. Create Social Media Presence — what platforms do we want to be on?
  6. Upload music to Apple Music, Spotify, etc. === ~$50
  7. Submit music to blogs, create an EPK — email using et4l.com
